nl_query: Show the complete moderation audit trail for each script that received moderation: the rule type, parameters, original total, adjusted total, mark difference, and the name of the COE user who applied it, ordered by application date.
failed_sql:
SELECT ma.rule_type, ma.parameters, ma.original_total, ma.adjusted_total, (ma.adjusted_total - ma.original_total) AS mark_difference, au.display_name AS applied_by
FROM   moderation_application ma
JOIN   moderation_rule        mr ON mr.id = ma.moderation_rule_id
JOIN   app_user            au ON au.id = ma.applied_by
JOIN   answer_script        a  ON a.id = ma.script_id
WHERE  a.evaluation_status = 'SUBMITTED'
ORDER  BY ma.applied_at DESC;
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): moderation_application.rule_type, moderation_application.parameters. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
